transcript: Now let me tell you, we all have heard something about stubborn hearts. Stubborn hearts always find their way, but have you noticed where that journey began from? Let me take you back to 2004 to a 9-year-old child who was madly in love with ice creams. She used to love ice creams every single day and a specific one chocolate feast until one day her mother told We cannot buy ice creams for you now. You have to buy it for your own self. And for that girl, the world shattered because for her, the only world consists of ice creams and that was her own world.
